stemHtml: How must obstacles near an aerodrome be illuminated when lighting is required?

options.a: With one or more low, medium, or high intensity lights positioned as near to the top of the obstacle as practicable.
options.b: With solid white or red lights placed as near to the top as feasible.
options.c: With high-intensity white or red lights.
options.d: With flashing white or red lights.
